description:
Extract view components from App.vue:
- ColumnView.vue
- GraphViewWrapper.vue  
- VoiceView.vue
- Keep App.vue as router + layout only

Cleaner separation of concerns, easier to test views independently

status.comment: App.vue refactoring complete: 841→590 lines (-30%). Extracted ColumnsView, GraphViewWrapper, ProjectSelectionView components. All tests pass.
